title: Ob4D1Fbja62L66Yhamd2R2Xv5Ttewg
summary:
"Dry bulk market and commodities had a mixed reaction to the latest stimulus measures."
By Michalis Voutsinas
One week before the second quarter's curtain fall, Baltic Dry Index concluded today in the green at 1240 points, reporting three-digitpoint weekly gains. By de-composing the general index though, a slightly different picture becomes apparent. It was solely the leading Capesize segment that push the main gauge of activity in the dry bulk spectrum higher.
